name: jmagar-lab
description: Local Codex marketplace for Jacob Magar's Lab homelab plugins.

plugins.name: acp
plugins.description: Agent Client Protocol skills for Rust, Python, and TypeScript implementations.

interface.shortDescription: Agent Client Protocol implementation guidance for Rust, Python, and TypeScript.
interface.longDescription: ACP packages implementation skills and protocol references for building Agent Client Protocol clients and agents, including session lifecycle, streaming, tool calls, and adapter patterns.
defaultPrompt: Use ACP to design a Rust agent-client-protocol integration.
Review this ACP session lifecycle implementation.
Explain how ACP tool calls should stream results.

plugins.name: adguard
plugins.description: Skill for operating adguard via the lab MCP server / CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Operate AdGuard Home DNS filtering and network-blocking workflows.
interface.longDescription: AdGuard Home provides agent workflows for inspecting DNS filtering state, reviewing blocked queries, managing allow/block decisions, and troubleshooting homelab DNS behavior.
defaultPrompt: Use AdGuard to inspect DNS filtering health.
Find recent blocked domains for a client.
Help troubleshoot why a domain is not resolving.

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents — navigate pages, fill forms, click, screenshot, scrape, and test web apps from your coding agent.

interface.shortDescription: Drive a real browser from your agent — navigate, fill, click, screenshot, scrape, and test.
interface.longDescription: Agent Browser is a browser automation CLI built for AI agents. It navigates pages, fills forms, clicks elements, captures screenshots, extracts data, and exercises web apps for exploratory testing and QA. Also automates Electron desktop apps and supports Vercel Sandbox microVMs and AWS Bedrock AgentCore cloud browsers.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Browser to fill out and submit this web form.
Use Agent Browser to screenshot and verify this page.
Use Agent Browser to click through and test this web app.

plugins.name: agent-os
plugins.description: Drive the agent-os Windows 11 sandbox VM through its Windows-MCP server. Self-registers the windows-mcp MCP from your configured URL + bearer token, ships the agent-os skill, a /agent-os status command, and a SessionStart health check.

interface.shortDescription: Drive the dedicated Windows 11 agent VM through Windows-MCP.
interface.longDescription: Agent OS connects Codex to the dedicated Windows 11 sandbox VM for desktop automation, Windows app testing, screenshots, shell commands, and VM health checks.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent OS to inspect the Windows VM.
Run a PowerShell command on agent-os.
Take a screenshot of the agent-os desktop.

plugins.name: arrs
plugins.description: The *arr / media-automation stack in one plugin: Radarr, Sonarr, Prowlarr, Overseerr, SABnzbd, qBittorrent, Plex, Jellyfin, Tautulli, and Tracearr — each operated via its own REST API. Credentials are configured here and bridged to the skills via a generated env file.

interface.shortDescription: Operate the Radarr, Sonarr, Prowlarr, Plex, Jellyfin, and downloader stack.
interface.longDescription: Arrs bundles media-automation skills for Radarr, Sonarr, Prowlarr, Overseerr, SABnzbd, qBittorrent, Plex, Jellyfin, Tautulli, and Tracearr using each service API directly.
defaultPrompt: Use Arrs to check the media stack.
Find stalled downloads across the Arr stack.
Search for a movie and prepare a Radarr add request.

plugins.name: beads
plugins.description: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows.

interface.shortDescription: AI-supervised issue tracker with beads for task creation, progress tracking, and dependency management.
interface.longDescription: Beads is a lightweight issue tracker purpose-built for AI coding workflows. Create issues before writing code, claim work, track dependencies, close on completion, and search persistent knowledge — all via the bd CLI. Replaces TodoWrite and markdown task files with a durable, cross-session store.
defaultPrompt: Use Beads to list ready work.
Create a Beads issue for this task.
Show blocked Beads issues and their dependencies.

plugins.name: bitwarden
plugins.description: Bitwarden and secrets-management workflows for homelab operations.

interface.shortDescription: Work with Bitwarden vault items and secrets-management flows.
interface.longDescription: Bitwarden provides secure agent workflows for finding vault items, handling unlocked CLI sessions, and supporting homelab credential lookup without hardcoding secrets.
defaultPrompt: Use Bitwarden to find the credential for this service.
Check whether the Bitwarden CLI session is unlocked.
Help prepare a secret lookup without exposing the value.

plugins.name: bytestash
plugins.description: Skills for operating a ByteStash snippet manager.

interface.shortDescription: Manage ByteStash snippets and reusable code notes.
interface.longDescription: ByteStash provides snippet search, creation, update, organization, and troubleshooting workflows for the self-hosted code snippet manager.
defaultPrompt: Use ByteStash to search for a Docker snippet.
Create a ByteStash snippet from this script.
Organize snippets related to Rust.

plugins.name: dozzle
plugins.description: Skill for operating Dozzle through direct HTTP API checks, auth guidance, and MCP setup notes.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Docker container logs through Dozzle and its native MCP endpoint.
interface.longDescription: Dozzle provides direct HTTP and MCP-oriented workflows for checking live Docker container logs, authentication setup, and log-viewer connectivity.
defaultPrompt: Use Dozzle to inspect recent container logs.
Check whether Dozzle MCP is reachable.
Help debug a container error from Dozzle logs.

plugins.name: immich
plugins.description: Skill for operating immich via the lab MCP server / CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Immich photo and video management workflows.
interface.longDescription: Immich packages workflows for searching assets, reviewing albums and jobs, checking server state, and assisting with self-hosted photo library operations.
defaultPrompt: Use Immich to inspect recent upload status.
Search Immich for assets from a date range.
Check Immich server health.

plugins.name: linkding
plugins.description: Skills for operating a Linkding bookmark manager.

interface.shortDescription: Search and manage Linkding bookmarks.
interface.longDescription: Linkding provides bookmark search, creation, update, tagging, and cleanup workflows for the self-hosted bookmark manager.
defaultPrompt: Use Linkding to find bookmarks about Rust MCP.
Save this URL to Linkding with tags.
Summarize my recent Linkding bookmarks.

plugins.name: loggifly
plugins.description: Skill for operating loggifly via the lab MCP server / CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Configure Docker log alerting with keyword and regex rules.
interface.longDescription: LoggiFly helps inspect and manage Docker container log alerting rules, keyword patterns, regex checks, and notification routing for homelab services.
defaultPrompt: Use LoggiFly to inspect active alert rules.
Add a log alert pattern for this container.
Check recent LoggiFly alert matches.

plugins.name: lavra
plugins.description: 30 specialized agents, 28 commands, 15 skills, persistent memory with auto-recall.

interface.shortDescription: 30 specialized agents, 28 commands, 15 skills, and persistent memory with auto-recall.
interface.longDescription: Lavra is a comprehensive agent and skills toolkit covering brainstorming, planning, research, feature development, code review, QA, design, and retrospectives. It ships 30 specialized agents, 28 slash commands, 15 skills, and a persistent cross-session memory system.
defaultPrompt: Use Lavra to plan and implement this feature.
Run a Lavra code review on recent changes.
Use Lavra brainstorming to explore this design.

plugins.name: memos
plugins.description: Skills for operating a Memos note hub.

interface.shortDescription: Manage notes and memos in the self-hosted Memos service.
interface.longDescription: Memos provides workflows for searching, creating, updating, and organizing short notes in a self-hosted Memos instance.
defaultPrompt: Use Memos to search for notes about this project.
Create a memo from this summary.
List recent Memos entries.

plugins.name: navidrome
plugins.description: Operate a self-hosted Navidrome music server through its Subsonic API with direct HTTP calls — ping, browse artists/albums, search, and list playlists.

interface.shortDescription: Browse and inspect a Navidrome music library through the Subsonic API.
interface.longDescription: Navidrome provides read-only music-library workflows for pinging the server, browsing artists and albums, searching tracks, listing playlists, and checking now-playing state.
defaultPrompt: Use Navidrome to search my music library.
List Navidrome playlists.
Check whether Navidrome is reachable.

plugins.name: neo4j
plugins.description: Skill for operating neo4j via the lab MCP server / CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Run Neo4j graph queries and inspect graph schema.
interface.longDescription: Neo4j bundles Cypher query, schema inspection, node and relationship exploration, and graph-database troubleshooting workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Neo4j to inspect the graph schema.
Run a Cypher query for related nodes.
Explain this Neo4j query plan.

plugins.name: notebooklm
plugins.description: NotebookLM research, source, generation, and download workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Operate NotebookLM sources, notebooks, and generated research artifacts.
interface.longDescription: NotebookLM provides programmatic workflows for managing sources, querying notebooks, generating summaries, and downloading research outputs.
defaultPrompt: Use NotebookLM to summarize this notebook.
Add this source to NotebookLM.
List recent NotebookLM generated outputs.

plugins.name: plexus
plugins.description: Remote-device memory and live operating context for host-specific work.

interface.shortDescription: Host-specific REMOTE.md memory with live infrastructure probes.
interface.longDescription: Plexus gives agents a CLAUDE.md-style memory file for each remote host, then combines it with live SSH, Tailscale, Docker, systemd, and log context before operating.
defaultPrompt: Use Plexus to inspect squirts before changing it.
Load live remote context for dookie.
Summarize recent host activity.

plugins.name: qdrant
plugins.description: Skill for operating qdrant via the lab MCP server / CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and manage Qdrant vector collections.
interface.longDescription: Qdrant provides workflows for collections, points, payloads, search, vector database health, and semantic-search troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Use Qdrant to list collections.
Inspect this Qdrant collection configuration.
Search Qdrant for similar vectors.

plugins.name: radicale
plugins.description: CalDAV and CardDAV workflow skills for Radicale.

interface.shortDescription: Manage CalDAV calendars and CardDAV contacts through Radicale.
interface.longDescription: Radicale packages calendar and contact workflows for inspecting collections, managing events or contacts, and troubleshooting CalDAV/CardDAV state.
defaultPrompt: Use Radicale to inspect calendar collections.
Find contacts matching this query.
Check whether the CalDAV endpoint is reachable.

plugins.name: scrutiny
plugins.description: Skill for operating scrutiny via the lab MCP server / CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect SMART drive health through Scrutiny.
interface.longDescription: Scrutiny provides workflows for checking disk SMART status, drive health, temperature, failure indicators, and homelab storage monitoring data.
defaultPrompt: Use Scrutiny to check drive health.
Show drives with SMART warnings.
Summarize recent disk-health changes.

plugins.name: swag-mcp
plugins.description: SWAG reverse proxy configuration management via MCP. Create, edit, view, and manage nginx proxy configurations with auth integration.

interface.shortDescription: Manage SWAG reverse-proxy configuration through MCP workflows.
interface.longDescription: SWAG MCP helps create, edit, view, back up, and validate SWAG nginx reverse-proxy configs with auth integration and local or SSH-backed storage.
defaultPrompt: Use SWAG MCP to create a proxy config.
Validate this nginx proxy configuration.
Inspect existing SWAG configs for a service.

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Core skills library: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques.

interface.shortDescription: Core skills library for TDD, systematic debugging, collaboration patterns, and engineering discipline.
interface.longDescription: Superpowers provides foundational coding discipline skills: test-driven development, systematic debugging, code review workflows, git worktrees, plan writing, subagent-driven development, and verification before completion. Each skill enforces a proven technique to reduce errors and improve output quality.
defaultPrompt: Use Superpowers TDD to implement this feature.
Use Superpowers systematic-debugging to diagnose this failure.
Use Superpowers to review and verify this change before merging.

plugins.name: tei
plugins.description: Skill for operating tei via the lab MCP server / CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Use Hugging Face Text Embeddings Inference for embeddings and reranking.
interface.longDescription: TEI provides workflows for checking Text Embeddings Inference health, embedding text, tokenizing input, and reranking documents against a query.
defaultPrompt: Use TEI to embed this text.

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: App-testing and MCP-tooling skills: live QA of web, Android, and desktop apps; MCP server smoke-testing (mcporter); MCP-UI / Apps validation (mcpjam); and claude-in-mobile device automation.

interface.shortDescription: Run web, Android, desktop, MCP, and app-validation testing workflows.
interface.longDescription: Testing bundles end-to-end QA skills for browser apps, Android APKs, Windows desktop apps, MCP smoke tests, MCP-UI validation, and mobile device automation.
defaultPrompt: Use Testing to run a web app QA pass.

Test this Android APK end to end.

plugins.name: uptime-kuma
plugins.description: Read-only monitoring of a self-hosted Uptime Kuma instance via direct HTTP — Prometheus /metrics (API-key auth) and public status-page JSON. No monitor management (that requires Uptime Kuma's socket.io API).

interface.shortDescription: Read Uptime Kuma monitor, metrics, and public status-page state.
interface.longDescription: Uptime Kuma provides read-only monitoring workflows for Prometheus metrics, API-key checks, public status-page JSON, heartbeat history, and uptime summaries.
defaultPrompt: Use Uptime Kuma to check monitor status.

Find monitors with recent downtime.

plugins.name: mcp-apps
plugins.description: Claude Code skill for building MCP Apps with interactive UIs.

interface.shortDescription: Build interactive MCP Apps with the MCP Apps SDK.
interface.longDescription: MCP Apps provides skills and guidance for creating interactive MCP-native applications using the MCP Apps SDK, including UI widgets, structured content, and resource-driven interfaces.
defaultPrompt: Use MCP Apps to scaffold a new MCP App.
Help me build an MCP widget with structuredContent.
Show me how to use the MCP Apps SDK.

plugins.name: nvidia-skills
plugins.description: NVIDIA agent skills for accelerated-computing workflows — starting with cuOpt vehicle-routing optimization via the cuOpt Python API.

interface.shortDescription: Agent skills for NVIDIA accelerated-computing and cuOpt optimization workflows.
interface.longDescription: NVIDIA Skills provides guidance for GPU-accelerated computing and cuOpt vehicle-routing optimization (VRP, TSP, PDP) via the cuOpt Python API.
defaultPrompt: Use NVIDIA skills to optimize this routing problem.
Help me set up cuOpt for VRP.
Use NVIDIA skills for vehicle routing optimization.

plugins.name: qdrant-skills
plugins.description: Agent skills for Qdrant vector search covering scaling, performance, search quality, monitoring, deployment, and SDK usage.

interface.shortDescription: Best-practice skills for Qdrant vector search — scaling, indexing, and performance tuning.
interface.longDescription: Qdrant Skills provides agent guidance on vector search architecture, collection design, indexing strategies, filtering, payload management, and performance optimization across Python, TypeScript, Rust, Go, .NET, and Java SDKs.
defaultPrompt: Use Qdrant skills to optimize my collection design.
Review my vector search setup for performance.
Help me choose the right indexing strategy for Qdrant.

plugins.name: redis-development
plugins.description: Redis development best practices — data structures, query engine, vector search, caching, and performance optimization.

interface.shortDescription: Redis development skills covering data structures, caching patterns, and query efficiency.
interface.longDescription: Redis Development provides agent guidance on Redis data structure selection, caching strategies, Lua scripting, pub/sub patterns, streams, cluster configuration, and query performance optimization.
defaultPrompt: Use Redis skills to design my caching layer.
Review my Redis data model for efficiency.
Help me implement a Redis pub/sub pattern.

plugins.name: webwright
plugins.description: Turn your coding agent into a browser agent using a local Playwright workspace, screenshots, action logs, and visual self-verification.

interface.shortDescription: SOTA browser agent driven by your coding agent.
interface.longDescription: Webwright drives a local Playwright workspace through coding-agent-authored scripts, saving screenshots and action logs into final_runs/run_<id>/ so browser tasks can be inspected, rerun, and visually verified.
defaultPrompt: Use Webwright to complete this browser task.
Use Webwright to craft a reusable browser automation script.
Use Webwright to inspect and verify this website workflow.

plugins.name: mcp-tunnels
plugins.description: Connect Claude to a private MCP server through an Anthropic-managed tunnel.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Claude to a private MCP server via an Anthropic-managed secure tunnel.
interface.longDescription: MCP Tunnels enables Claude to reach private or locally-running MCP servers through a secure Anthropic-managed tunnel, removing the need for public network exposure or manual port forwarding.
defaultPrompt: Set up an MCP tunnel to my local server.
Connect Claude to my private MCP endpoint.
Help me configure an MCP tunnel.

plugins.name: vibin
plugins.description: Session, repo status, GitHub review, and CI workflow skills for branch/worktree readiness audits, quick push, session documentation, PR comments, and CI debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Session, repo status, GitHub review, CI, and agent workflow utilities.
interface.longDescription: Vibin bundles session documentation, repo status and branch/worktree readiness audits, quick-push, GitHub PR review, CI debugging, Windows VM, screenshot, clipboard, and homelab workflow skills.
defaultPrompt: Use Vibin to quick-push this change.
Use Vibin to audit repo branch and worktree status.
Use Vibin to address PR review comments.
Save this session to Markdown.

plugins.name: lumen
plugins.description: Precise local semantic code search via MCP. Indexes your codebase with Go AST parsing and vector embeddings — Ollama, LM Studio, or HuggingFace TEI.

interface.shortDescription: Precise local semantic code search over your indexed codebase.
interface.longDescription: Lumen indexes a codebase with Go AST parsing and vector embeddings (Ollama, LM Studio, or HuggingFace TEI) and serves fast semantic code search through MCP.
defaultPrompt: Use Lumen to find where this behavior is implemented.

plugins.name: axon
plugins.description: Skills and MCP configuration for the Axon crawl, ingest, embed, query, and RAG engine.

interface.shortDescription: Self-hosted crawl, scrape, embed, and RAG knowledge engine.
interface.longDescription: Axon drives a self-hosted RAG stack: crawl and scrape sites, ingest GitHub/Reddit/YouTube, embed into Qdrant, run hybrid semantic search, and answer questions with cited synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Use Axon to research this topic and index the results.

plugins.description: Homelab syslog receiver plus MCP server for searching, tailing, and correlating logs across hosts.

interface.shortDescription: Homelab log aggregation — search, tail, and correlate logs across hosts.
interface.longDescription: Cortex is a syslog receiver and MCP server that ingests logs across homelab hosts and exposes search, tail, correlation, and AI transcript analysis.
defaultPrompt: Use Cortex to search recent errors across hosts.

plugins.description: Unraid NAS/homelab monitoring via the unrust MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor Unraid NAS array, shares, and Docker via the unrust MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Unraid surfaces array health, disks, shares, and Docker state from an Unraid server through the unrust GraphQL MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Arcane (rarcane) manages Docker through the Arcane API: list and control containers, inspect images and networks, and operate compose stacks.

plugins.description: Skills for designing and building MCP servers that work seamlessly with Claude. Guides you through deployment models (remote HTTP, MCPB, local), tool design patterns, auth, and interactive MCP apps.

interface.shortDescription: Design and build MCP servers, tools, and interactive apps.
interface.longDescription: MCP Server Dev guides deployment models (remote HTTP, MCPB, local), tool-design patterns, auth, and interactive MCP apps for building servers that work with Claude.
defaultPrompt: Use MCP Server Dev to build an MCP server.
Design tools for this MCP integration.
Add an interactive MCP app/widget.

plugins.name: playground
plugins.description: Creates interactive HTML playgrounds — self-contained single-file explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output with copy button. Includes templates for design playgrounds, data explorers, concept maps, and document critique.

interface.shortDescription: Create self-contained interactive HTML playgrounds.
interface.longDescription: Playground builds single-file HTML explorers with visual controls, live preview, and prompt output — templates for design, data exploration, concept maps, and document critique.
defaultPrompt: Use Playground to build an interactive explorer.
Create a design playground for these tokens.
Make a data explorer for this dataset.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive toolkit for developing Claude Code plugins. Includes 7 expert skills covering hooks, MCP integration, commands, agents, and best practices. AI-assisted plugin creation and validation.

interface.shortDescription: Toolkit for building and validating Claude Code plugins.
interface.longDescription: Plugin Dev bundles expert skills for hooks, MCP integration, commands, agents, and plugin structure, with AI-assisted creation and validation.
defaultPrompt: Use Plugin Dev to scaffold a new plugin.
Validate this plugin's structure.
Add a hook to my plugin.

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

interface.shortDescription: Specialized PR review agents across many quality dimensions.
interface.longDescription: PR Review Toolkit provides agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and simplification for thorough PR review.
defaultPrompt: Review this PR with the toolkit.
Check test coverage on these changes.
Hunt for silent failures in the diff.

plugins.name: pyright-lsp
plugins.description: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and code intelligence

interface.shortDescription: Python language server (Pyright) for type checking and intelligence.
interface.longDescription: pyright-lsp wires Pyright into the agent for Python type checking, definitions, references, and diagnostics.
defaultPrompt: Type-check this Python module.
Find references to this Python symbol.
Go to the definition of this function.

plugins.name: ralph-loop
plugins.description: Interactive self-referential AI loops for iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Claude works on the same task repeatedly, seeing its previous work, until completion.

interface.shortDescription: Self-referential iteration loops that retry a task until done.
interface.longDescription: Ralph Loop runs interactive self-referential loops: the agent repeatedly works the same task, seeing its prior output, until completion criteria are met.
defaultPrompt: Start a Ralph Loop on this task.
Iterate on this until tests pass.
Cancel the active Ralph Loop.

plugins.name: rust-analyzer-lsp
plugins.description: Rust language server for code intelligence and analysis

interface.shortDescription: Rust language server for code intelligence and analysis.
interface.longDescription: rust-analyzer-lsp wires rust-analyzer into the agent for definitions, references, diagnostics, and analysis.
defaultPrompt: Find references to this Rust symbol.
Go to the definition of this trait.
Check rust-analyzer diagnostics.

plugins.name: serena
plugins.description: Semantic code analysis MCP server providing intelligent code understanding, refactoring suggestions, and codebase navigation through language server protocol integration.

interface.shortDescription: Semantic code analysis and navigation MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Serena is a semantic code-analysis MCP server offering intelligent code understanding, refactoring suggestions, and codebase navigation via LSP integration.
defaultPrompt: Use Serena to navigate this codebase.
Suggest refactors for this module.
Find the symbol that defines this behavior.

plugins.name: session-report
plugins.description: Generate an explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage — tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills, and the most expensive prompts — from local ~/.claude/projects transcripts.

interface.shortDescription: Explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage.
interface.longDescription: Session Report builds an interactive HTML report of session usage — tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills, and the most expensive prompts — from local transcripts.
defaultPrompt: Generate a session usage report.
Show me the most expensive prompts this session.
Report token and cache efficiency.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

interface.shortDescription: Create, improve, and benchmark agent skills.
interface.longDescription: Skill Creator builds new skills, improves existing ones, optimizes descriptions for triggering, and runs evals to benchmark skill performance.
defaultPrompt: Use Skill Creator to make a new skill.
Improve this skill's description.
Run evals on this skill.

plugins.name: telegram
plugins.description: Telegram messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

interface.shortDescription: Telegram messaging bridge with built-in access control.
interface.longDescription: Telegram bridges agent notifications and chat to Telegram, with pairing, allowlists, and policy managed via /telegram:access.
defaultPrompt: Set up the Telegram bridge.
Manage Telegram access and allowlists.
Send a message to Telegram.

plugins.name: typescript-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for enhanced code intelligence

interface.shortDescription: TypeScript/JavaScript language server for code intelligence.
interface.longDescription: typescript-lsp wires the TypeScript/JavaScript language server into the agent for definitions, references, and diagnostics.
defaultPrompt: Go to the definition of this TypeScript symbol.
Find usages of this function.
Check TypeScript diagnostics.

plugins.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
plugins.description: Control and inspect a live Chrome browser from your coding agent. Record performance traces, analyze network requests, check console messages with source-mapped stack traces, and automate browser actions with Puppeteer.

interface.shortDescription: Control and inspect a live Chrome browser via DevTools.
interface.longDescription: Chrome DevTools MCP drives a live Chrome through DevTools/Puppeteer: record performance traces, analyze network and console with source-mapped stacks, and automate browser actions.
defaultPrompt: Use Chrome DevTools to inspect this page.
Record a performance trace for this site.
Check the console and network requests.

plugins.name: zsh-tool
plugins.description: Zsh shell for Claude Code - full terminal control, live output, PTY mode for interactive commands

interface.shortDescription: Full zsh terminal control with live output and PTY mode.
interface.longDescription: Zsh Tool gives the agent a real zsh shell with full terminal control, live streaming output, and PTY mode for interactive commands.
defaultPrompt: Run this command in a live zsh shell.
Use Zsh Tool for an interactive PTY session.
Stream output from a long-running command.
